title: Reinforcement Learning and Reward as EML-2

analysis.object: T614: Reinforcement Learning and Reward as EML-2 depth analysis

reward_signal.description: RL reward: EML-2 scalar measurement; optimization target
reward_signal.reason: Reward is EML-2: discrete scalar; the fundamental measurement signal of RL

intrinsic_motivation.description: Curiosity-driven learning: EML-3 oscillation toward information-rich states
intrinsic_motivation.reason: Intrinsic motivation is EML-3: oscillatory exploration of state space

qualia_ceiling.description: RL cannot generate EML-inf qualia from EML-2 reward; ceiling theorem
qualia_ceiling.reason: RL ceiling: optimizing EML-2 reward cannot produce EML-inf experience; measurement cannot become qualia

analysis.theorem: T614: Reinforcement Learning and Reward as EML-2 (S893).

key_theorem: T614: Reinforcement Learning and Reward as EML-2 (S893).
